title: THETA Control Room — Build Hook Delta

changedProjects.lastKnownStatus: Build hook reported latest project state.
changedProjects.nextAction: v0.4.49 — ACCENT RAILS RETIRED ON PLATES (user on the v0.4.48 fusion round: 'much better. lose the colored columns in the modules, they dont make sense now'). The per-module colored rail (blue COMPRESS / gold GRIT / coral AMBER) was the last flat procedural stripe over the baked steel — gated off under EPh::kPlates (legacy non-plate mode keeps it). Module color identity now carries via lamps + per-module lens tint (accLean), as on real consoles. No rebake needed. VERIFY: module left edges clean in both themes. OPEN: further polish per Steve; LIMITER rename.
